meaning: adj.[物] 反磁性的n.反磁性体
examples: In magnetism. The diamagnetic materials. Right.
Many of the metals and most of the nonmetals are diamagnetic.
The complex is diamagnetic, it is only slightly soluble in water.
Most materials, including milk and water, are diamagnetic, which means they are repelled by external magnetic fields though this phenomenon is far too subtle to be observed in normal circumstances.
